title: 3-D Puzzles Owl Clock, Kikuo Mechanical Wooden Model Kit, Laser Cut 3D Wooden Construction DIY Model Kits for Adults Teens and Children - Build Your own Wood Craft Clock
features: Vintage Owl Clock: This 3D wooden models features the classic shape of an owl. Not only is he a home decoration, he can also be a precise quartz movement and the high quality fitted batteries can replace a real clock with a sweeping seconds movement that keeps accurate and silent time.

High Quality Construction Kit: The 3D wooden model kits puzzle is made from durable wood, making it resistant to warping, environmentally friendly and easy to assemble without glue. 3 The raw linden wood is resistant to warping. Kikuo wooden craft kits are safe for children and adults alike.

DIY Clock Wood: This amazing mechanical clock kit comes with 3D illustrations and is easy to put together. Our 3D puzzles for adults/childs will exercise children's/adult's patience and give them a sense of achievement and increase their self-confidence once they are assembled.

Laser Cutting Process: Cutting tolerances are controlled to 5 microns to ensure consistent assembly accuracy in different climatic regions. A full set of laser cut puzzles with accurate card slots and a smooth burr-free surface that won't hurt your hands and assembles smoothly.

Perfect Gift Idea: Surprise your family and friends with a homemade mechanical clock 3D wooden puzzle that will be loved by all. It can also be given as a Christmas gift or birthday gift to mechanical puzzle lovers.
description: Product description Product Name: New Owl Alarm Clock Building Block Product Colour: Wooden original colour Package Includes: 1 Pack of wooden clock block*, 1 pack of accessories, english instructions*1 Directions Included
